notes: Meeting converges through productive tension. Vish's eight-pattern framework is adopted as shared vocabulary by multiple participants. Sam personalizes the framework through self-disclosure (branding feature failure). TJ offers substantive pushback on gates but engages using the same conceptual vocabulary, and the group resolves the tension through the red cord / andon cord metaphor which reframes imposed process as individual empowerment. Meeting ends with clear role assignments and next steps. | Caveats: TJ's gate-vs-ownership tension is deferred rather than resolved — convergence is directional, not complete; 30-minute time constraint compressed discussion — some topics were cut short by scheduling; Yumi's 'one simple problem' question remains open — foundational alignment question unanswered in this session
